files.notes: This file contains the Editorial section followed by multiple Guide Lessons (II, III, and IV). The last lesson (IV) appears to be cut off mid-sentence. The lessons cover Theology and Testimony, Work and Business, Genealogy and Literature, and Home Economics respectively.
